items.name: Israel Payot Hair with Top Hat
items.description:
Check out our full store here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?taxonomy=tZsUsd2BqGViQrJ9Vs3Wah&CreatorName=Jewish+UGC&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3
✡️ 
Jewish payot hair refers to the traditional side curls worn by Orthodox Jewish men, grown in accordance with interpretations of the Torah commandment prohibiting shaving the corners of the head. These Jewish sidecurls, often called payot or peyos, are a distinctive part of Orthodox Jewish hairstyles, especially among Hasidic and Haredi Jewish communities.
